title: Why Is Facial Anatomy Knowledge Important In Aesthetic Treatments？

segments.text: why do we even need to worry all that much about well there's a couple of reasons firstly you can get started with some really with anything that's superficial and people get the feeling that they can understand that you know it's like there's only a little crease if I inject that and go away that's where it'll start doesn't feel like you need to know loads of facial anatomy initially and they're wrong but that's often sometimes how you feel it feels a little bit doable as soon as you start to do anything more than little creases you start to get this nagging sense of what you know you should have a nagging sense of what's going on underneath there and that that's not to say obviously there should be no one certainly no healthcare professional who's injecting without knowing the basics but it's a very different thing knowing the basics and having essentially what you're building with your Anatomy not Anatomy knowledge is a real sense of your of where you are where you're positioned in space relative to all the important structures it's really different to well that

I always say the difference is like the difference between having a map and knowing your way is very different you love direction so that sense of knowing exactly where you are in space is very different to knowing that you've got a map with you and it's a different world in fact and that's what you're trying to get to with mastering Anatomy because you feel you've got all your key bearings you can make then you can then make decisions and judgments that feel like they're based on reality rather than a stab in the dark literally so it's a different world when you get when you develop that confidence in your own anatomical mental model [Music]
